groups.title: Essentials
groups.description: Minimum inputs for a location-accurate GBP post.

groups.title: Profile & business
groups.description: Verified business identity and category only.

groups.title: Location
groups.description: Address, service area, access — never invent nearby cities.

groups.title: Multi-location
groups.description: Which locations this post applies to.

groups.title: Platform format
groups.description: GBP post format, CTA button, limits — verify in account.

groups.title: Local audience
groups.description: Who this post is for and local intent.

groups.title: Business hours
groups.description: Only verified hours; update profile fields too.

groups.title: Product / service
groups.description: What is currently available at this location.

groups.title: Offer
groups.description: Prices and deadlines only if real and enforced.

groups.title: Appointments & booking
groups.description: Real availability and booking paths only.

groups.title: Links
groups.description: Approved destinations and UTM if used.

groups.title: CTA button
groups.description: Only buttons currently available on the profile.

groups.title: AI / synthetic media
groups.description: Disclosure when synthetic media is used.

groups.title: Reviews & reputation
groups.description: No review gating or fake ratings.

groups.title: Corrections
groups.description: What is being fixed and why.

groups.title: A/B testing
groups.description: One variable at a time if testing.

variables.label: Business Name
variables.hint: Public business name as on the Google profile.

help.what: Business name on the Google Business Profile.
help.why: Posts must match the real profile identity.
help.example: Northside Studio
help.avoid: Invented brands or mismatched NAP names.

variables.label: Topic
variables.placeholder: New Saturday hours starting next week
variables.hint: What the post is about — one clear local update.

help.what: Post topic.
help.why: Keeps the GBP post focused on one operational or local message.
help.example: Temporary closure for renovations March 10–12
help.avoid: Generic multi-platform promo copy.

variables.label: Post Type
variables.hint: Pick the confirmed type — do not change it later.

help.what: Post Type — a parameter from the Google Business Profile post brief (Post information).
help.why: When provided, the model uses this instead of inventing local facts, hours, offers, or profile details. Empty fields stay unset ([postType]).
help.example: holiday-hours update
help.avoid: Keyword stuffing, fake local areas, invented hours/prices, or multi-location mix-ups for post type.
